module_description: Monitors RAID array health via /proc/mdstat on each bound host — locally or over the host's SSH connection. Alerts on degraded or recovering arrays.

hints.enabled: Enable or disable this RAID check.
hints.threads: Number of hosts to check in parallel.
hints.mdstat_path: Path to the mdstat file read on the host (default /proc/mdstat).
hints.label: Display name shown in the UI. Falls back to the item key if empty.

rename_item_prompt: Enter new check name or identifier:

messages.raid_unsupported_os: RAID: {} - mdstat only available on Linux (host OS: {}) ⚠️
messages.raid_recovery: RAID {}/{} is degraded, recovery status {}%, estimate time to finish {}. ⚠️
